prompt: Extract the total amount from the following invoice document and return it as JSON.
context:
Invoice #DUP-7
Vendor: Anywhere LLC
Line items: $100.00, $250.00
Tax: $35.00
Total Amount: $385.00
anti_contamination_evidence: Adapted from a generic invoice-extraction template. The prompt phrasing intentionally mirrors a well-known invoice-extraction benchmark style, used here as a demonstration of how the novelty gate penalizes prompts that resemble widely-studied invoice tasks. The numeric values and vendor name are randomized.
